nodes.label: Tests for the pure-Python Federated Distillation logic (ssfl.methods.fd_logic).
K=3 clients, L=3 classes; zero rows mark absent classes.
N^l == 1: exclude-self leaves nothing -> zero vector for the         contributor
All-zero targets (no class has a target) + any gamma must train         exactly
The distill step keeps the CE term: with gamma=0 it is plain         supervised
Same evaluation-helper contract as the FL unit (final macro metrics).
2 clients with disjoint-ish classes + a small test split.
FD has no global model: the round metric is the best client's         accuracy,
